title: Gothofreda lanata
taxonomy: Gothofreda lanata is a type of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Campanulaceae, commonly known as the bellflower family. Gothofreda lanata is an annual or biennial herbaceous plant native to the Mediterranean region. Its classification includes being part of the genus Gothofreda, which is a monotypic genus. Gothofreda lanata is also known as Campanula lanata in some classifications.
